basic_details.job_title: DHFW Punjab Specialist Doctor Recruitment 2026 - Walkin
basic_details.organization_name: Department of Health and Family Welfare Punjab (DHFW Punjab)
basic_details.short_information: Department of Health and Family Welfare Punjab (DHFW Punjab) Specialist Doctor Notification 2026 has been released on 1 May 2026 on the official website of DHFW Punjab. Have been announced through the DHFW Punjab Specialist Doctor Recruitment 2026.

important_dates.interview_date: Every 2nd and 4th Tuesday of the month

qualification.education_qualification: MBBS with MD/MS/DNB degree/DNB diploma from a recognized University
qualification.details: MBBS with MD/MS/DNB degree/DNB diploma from a recognized University or Institution recognized by the Medical Council of India. Candidates should have registered with Punjab Medical Council/ Medical Council of India. Candidates should have passed subject of Punjabi upto Matric standard.

salary_details.pay_scale: Empanelment fee per patient, with minimum assured amounts.
salary_details.details: OPD: Rs 100 per patient (50-150 patients per day), Rs 100 additional fee per patient (above 50) IPD: Rs 100 per patient (2-20 patients per day), Rs 100 additional fee per patient (above 2) Major Surgeries/ Caesarean section: Rs 3500 per patient Minor Surgeries: Rs 1000 per patient Minor procedure: Rs 500 per patient Ultrasound: Rs 400 per patient Emergency call: Rs 1500 per visit Anesthesia Charges (for major surgeries): Rs 2000 per patient Pathology: Annexure 1

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the DHFW Punjab Specialist Doctor recruitment?
faq.answer: The recruitment is through a walk-in interview. The interview is scheduled for every 2nd and 4th Tuesday of the month. Candidates should report with documents on these dates.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Specialist Doctor post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess an MBBS degree with an MD/MS/DNB degree or DNB diploma from a recognized institution. Additionally, they must have passed Punjabi up to the Matric standard.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for candidates applying for the Specialist Doctor position is less than 64 years.

faq.question: Q4. How is the salary structured for the Specialist Doctor position?
faq.answer: The salary is based on an empanelment fee per patient for OPD and IPD services, with additional fees for surgeries and procedures. Minimum assured amounts are also provided.

faq.question: Q5. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q6. What is the mode of application for the Specialist Doctor post?
faq.answer: The application process is through a Walk-In Interview. Candidates need to report directly to the venue with their documents.

faq.question: Q7. Which specialties are included for the Specialist Doctor role?
faq.answer: The recruitment covers various specialties including Medicine, Surgery, Pediatrics, Psychiatry, Dermatology, Chest & TB, Obstetrics & Gynecology, Orthopedics, Ophthalmology, ENT, Anesthesiology, Radiology, and Pathology.

faq.question: Q8. What documents are required for the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: Candidates must bring original and self-attested photocopies of all relevant documents, including ID proof, educational certificates, registration certificates, and Punjabi language proof.

faq.question: Q9. Where will the walk-in interview be conducted?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview will be conducted in Chandigarh, Punjab. Specific venue details will be available in the official notification.

faq.question: Q10. Is prior online application required for the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: No, prior online application is not required. Candidates can directly attend the walk-in interview with all necessary documents.
